"use client"; // src/useSuspenseInfiniteQuery.ts import { InfiniteQueryObserver, skipToken } from "@tanstack/query-core"; import { useBaseQuery } from "./useBaseQuery.js"; import { defaultThrowOnError } from "./suspense.js"; function useSuspenseInfiniteQuery(options, queryClient) { if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") { if (options.queryFn === skipToken) { console.error("skipToken is not allowed for useSuspenseInfiniteQuery"); } } return useBaseQuery( { ...options, enabled: true, suspense: true, throwOnError: defaultThrowOnError }, InfiniteQueryObserver, queryClient ); } export { useSuspenseInfiniteQuery }; //# sourceMappingURL=useSuspenseInfiniteQuery.js.map
